Vendor Types
  • Insurer: Insurance companies providing coverage
  • TPA: Third-party administrators for claims processing
  • PBM: Pharmacy benefit managers
  • Broker Partner: Other brokers and agencies
  • Consultant: Benefits consultants and specialists
  • Attorney: Legal services providers
